gate_role: bounded H0-E-v3 cell-changing mechanism pilot only; success permits a separately frozen H0-E-v3 occurrence protocol but does not qualify H0-E, H0, or authorize H1a

rationale.e1a_observation: one-step maximal-t evaluated 430 edges and found zero new candidate materials; 17/64 child groups had no incoming t edge, 236 edges failed the orbit-defect prefilter far from threshold, 191 failed the complete assignment group law, and three paths from one material failed StructureMatcher and the strain bound
rationale.multistep_t_dominance: for H subset M subset G, Fix(G) is a subset of Fix(M), hence distance(x,Fix(G)) >= distance(x,Fix(M)); adding t-supergroups cannot repair an already distant first maximal-t projection and cannot reach a child with no incoming t edge
rationale.new_mechanism: maximal klassengleiche embeddings restore parent translations through an exact finite translation quotient and therefore test a cell-changing mechanism absent from E1a
rationale.not_e1b: this protocol is a separately frozen H0-E-v3 successor designed after the v2 stop; it does not continue the prohibited E1b branch

selection.source: the exact ordered 64-material E1a zero-candidate panel, including all historical rows; path quarantine is applied only to matching candidate paths

setting_and_search.setting: the exact PyXtal/ITA Hall setting used by frozen E0, converted once to primitive coordinates
setting_and_search.candidate_scope: every unique E0 kind=k record with cell_index in 2..4 reverse-indexed by observed child space group
setting_and_search.primitive_embedding: T_prim = P_parent^-1 T_conv P_child with integral basis B and det(B)=cell_index
setting_and_search.parent_action_in_child_cell: all |G|*det(B) Seitz representatives generated by the exact quotient Z^3 / B Z^3; node actions must satisfy the complete group law
setting_and_search.lattice_projection: Reynolds projection in the primitive parent metric followed by exact B^T supercell expansion and proper Procrustes gauge
setting_and_search.site_projection: one frozen species-preserving assignment under the full parent-supercell affine action, followed by a single Reynolds mean and exact parent-cell quotient
setting_and_search.orbit_defect_prefilter: triangle-safe 2x source-displacement bound; final acceptance uses one-sided projected displacement

positive_controls: SG1 index-2 translation-breaking distortion recovers its one-site primitive parent
a nontrivial point-group index-2 supercell distortion recovers the strict parent group
off-diagonal integral embedding quotient has the declared index, closes, and is enumeration-order invariant
advancement_rule: K0 success permits only a separately frozen H0-E-v3 occurrence protocol. Any K0 failure freezes the negative result and stops H0-E-v3, H1a/H1b and H2-H6. K0 never changes H0-E-v1 or H0-E-v2 history.
